app.title: Global Airsoft App
home.title: Home
auth.loginSubtitle: Discover matches, connect your squad, and get real-time updates from the community.
auth.passwordRecoverySubtitle: Enter your email to receive a secure password recovery link.
auth.passwordRecoverySuccessMessage: We sent an email to {email} with your password recovery link. Open your inbox and tap the link to continue. If it does not arrive in a few minutes, check spam or promotions.
auth.signUpSubtitle: Set up your profile and join the community to find games, teams, and new connections.
auth.userNameRestrictionHint: Use only lowercase letters (a-z). No spaces, numbers, or symbols.
auth.passwordRulesRequireLowercase: Include at least one lowercase letter.
auth.passwordRulesRequireUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.
auth.passwordRulesFailed: Unable to load password rules. Please try again.
auth.passwordRequirementsNotMet: Your password does not meet the required rules yet.
auth.passwordRecoveryFailed: Unable to send the recovery email. Please try again.
notification.permissionPrePromptSubtitle: Enable notifications so you do not miss important activity.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitF: Get notified when someone adds you.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitG: See events and matches near you.
notification.permissionPrePromptBenefitT: Receive invitations from teams looking for players.
notification.permissionDeniedBody: To receive alerts about friendships, games, and team invites, enable notifications in your device settings.
notification.channel.messagesDescription: Chat messages and direct communication updates.
notification.channel.socialDescription: Friend requests and social activity updates.
notification.channel.othersDescription: General notifications that do not match Messages or Social channels.
validation.passwordRequireLowercase: Include at least one lowercase letter.
validation.passwordRequireUppercase: Include at least one uppercase letter.
validation.userNameLowercaseOnly: Use only lowercase letters (a-z), without spaces, numbers, or symbols.
